full_text:
Wei Duan (Xiufu) 韋端 (休甫)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wei Duan (韋端), styledXiufu (休甫). Became Cao Cao’s agent in the West, brokering peace between Ma Teng and Han Sui. Wei Duan was affiliated with the Han Dynasty and the Wei Kingdom.
